title: The War Spreads from the Live Floor to the Roof
description: On pages 35–38, this part focuses on Unknown person #33, Unknown person #34, Apoo, Unknown person #35, Unknown person #36 as The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.
scene: The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: It still wants to eat you "Masky"

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't give me shitty pen names, you bastard!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You sure have a sharp tongue, why don't you like it?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We ob- tained an incredible amount of power

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: which provided our ship with both speed and stability.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and relative to our previous attempt, we managed to keep

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The size down; even salvaging materials from the wreckage.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ACE's fire ability was instrumental throughout the entire process

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And just before we would have been goners

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What's the point of sailing on a ship with no name?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: Because soon, this island of misfortune in

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You think you can eat us now that we're at sea, eh?

summary: This section advances the Wano - The War Spreads Across Onigashima storyline with 27 dialogue beats. The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.
